title: Extending your open work permit - Canada.ca
content:
## Extending your open work permit
You can extend your open work permit as a Quebec investor once, for a period of up to 2 years.

## Who can extend their open work permit
You may be eligible for an open work permit extension if you meet all of the following criteria:
- You hold a valid Quebec Selection Certificate (CSQ) issued under the Quebec Investor Program .
- You haven’t applied for permanent residence, or you’ve applied but haven’t received a completeness check.
- You’re living in Quebec when you apply to extend your open work permit.
You don’t need a new Quebec Notice of Intent to Select to extend your work permit under this program.
You need to meet all of the above criteria to be eligible for this open work permit.

## You meet the criteria
If you meet these criteria, you’re eligible for an open work permit as a Quebec investor.

## How to extend your open work permit
For the main steps to apply, see how to extend your work permit in Canada . Below are extra steps.
Read the instruction guide before you complete your application.

### How to fill out the IMM 5710 form
- Application to Change Conditions or Extend Your Stay in Canada [IMM 5710] (opens in a new tab)
Under Details of intended work in Canada , fill in the information as follows:
- Question 1: What type of work permit are you applying for? Answer: Choose “Open Work Permit”.
- Answer: Choose “Open Work Permit”.
- Question 4: My occupation in Canada will be: Answer: Write “T10 Quebec Investors” in the Job Title box.
- Answer: Write “T10 Quebec Investors” in the Job Title box.
